events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV first launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural music video.

angles.name: Video Killed...
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is still golden. What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation. What's your standout track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year, passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering The King, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 today. His music continues to shake, rattle, and roll generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year, passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled guitar genius, Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His sound truly changed everything.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and style are simply iconic.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still one of the most distinctive voices in rock.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity remains as powerful as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped 25 years ago? It changed how we listened to music forever. How many songs did yours hold?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and all the iconic theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, who would have been 86 this year, was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His legacy of music and peace lives on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles released 'White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles released their iconic 'White Album'. A double album packed with classics! What's your favourite track?
